ddls:
CREATE TABLE "borrowers" (
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrower */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the borrower */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the borrower */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the borrower */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the borrower */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the borrower */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the borrower */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the borrower */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the borrower */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the borrower */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the borrower */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the borrower */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the borrower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the loan officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan officer */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch where the loan officer is based */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the loan officer */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the loan officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrower who received the loan */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "term_in_months" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in months */,
  "disbursal_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was disbursed */,
  "repayment_date" TEXT /* Date the loan is due for repayment */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan (e.g., active, repaid, defaulted) */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the partner who funded the loan */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer who disbursed the loan */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the loan was disbursed */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency in which the loan was disbursed */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., business, education, agriculture) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES borrowers ("borrower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES partners ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrower who submitted the application */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan applied for */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan applied for */,
  "term_in_months" INTEGER /* Term of the loan applied for in months */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., business, education, agriculture) */,
  "business_plan" TEXT /* Business plan submitted by the borrower */,
  "credit_score" REAL /* Credit score of the borrower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES borrowers ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repayments" (
  "repayment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repayment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being repaid */,
  "repayment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the repayment */,
  "repayment_date" TEXT /* Date the repayment was made */,
  "repayment_method" TEXT /* Method of repayment (e.g., cash, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repayment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repayments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the branch */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the branch */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the branch */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the branch */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the branch */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch manager */,
  "manager_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the branch manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., PKR, INR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., Pakistani Rupee, Indian Rupee) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency with respect to the base currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the partner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the partner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the partner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the partner */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding provided by the partner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan the tag is assigned to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., agriculture, education) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_tags_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan the purpose is assigned to */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the purpose (e.g., business, education, agriculture) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_purposes_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan product */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan product */,
  "term_in_months" INTEGER /* Term of the loan product in months */,
  "loan_amount_range" TEXT /* Range of loan amounts for the loan product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan transaction */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan the transaction is related to */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (disbursal or repayment) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_transactions_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)
